stories.headline: World Cup final Lamine Yamal: What to know about teenage Spain prodigy
stories.description: One of the best players in the world, Spain’s 19-year-old Lamine Yamal, is gearing up for his first World Cup final.

stories.headline: Reform UK proposes £100m 'round-the-clock' security plan for MPs
stories.description: The policy was announced after police said party spokeswoman Ann Widdecombe was killed in a "targeted attack".

stories.headline: I changed jobs 10 times in 10 years to get the career I wanted
stories.description: The lily-padding trend sees young people repeatedly move jobs to try to advance in the workplace.

stories.headline: Protest in Pakistan’s Kashmir stalls after nine killed in clashes
stories.description: At least 28 people have been killed since protests began in June, as the region braces for a major protest march.

stories.headline: Three men jailed for Brighton beach rape
stories.description: The rapists carried out a "cynical, predatory and callous" attack, jurors were told.
